name: python3-django-imagekit
title: python3-django-imagekit
summary: Automated image processing for Django (Python3 version)
description:
Automated image processing for Django (Python3 version)
ImageKit is a Django app for processing images. Need a thumbnail? A
black-and-white version of a user-uploaded image? ImageKit will make them for
you. If you need to programmatically generate one image from another, you need
ImageKit.
.
ImageKit comes with a bunch of image processors for common tasks like resizing
and cropping, but you can also create your own.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-imagekit because Automated image processing for Django (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-imagekit as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-imagekit with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-imagekit --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
